channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says Carroll verdict setback surprised him
item.description: President Trump expressed surprise after the Supreme Court rejected his attempt to overturn a $5 million civil verdict for sexual abuse and defamation.

item.title: Gallego under federal investigation over campaign spending
item.description: Sen. Ruben Gallego (D-Ariz.) is being investigated by federal authorities for possible campaign finance violations, Axios has learned.

item.title: Small towns struggle with fireworks costs
item.description: America's 250th birthday is expected to be a major fireworks event, but only for towns that can afford the expense.

item.title: Supreme Court upholds grace period for late mail-in ballots
item.description: The Supreme Court on Monday upheld a Mississippi law allowing mail ballots postmarked by Election Day to be counted if received within a certain period.
